settings.title: Settings
settings.measure_hint: Used by MusicXML export to structure measures and calculate tempo.
settings.author: MusicXML Author (Composer)
settings.autosave_path_hint: Leave empty for default Temp folder.
settings.global_desc: Global application settings like theme, language, and audio output.
settings.project_desc: Settings specific to the current project, such as time signature.
settings.autosave_desc: Configure automatic backup behavior and location.
settings.theme_desc: Change the visual appearance of the interface.
settings.volume_desc: Adjust the loudness of metronome clicks.
settings.audio_device_desc: Choose which audio hardware to use for playback.
settings.keys_desc: Set the number of visible keys in the spectrum piano roll.
settings.autosave_enabled_desc: Toggle automatic background saving of your project.
settings.autosave_forced_desc: Save even if no changes have been detected.
settings.autosave_interval_desc: How often (in minutes) to perform an autosave.
settings.autosave_snapshots_desc: Maximum number of historical snapshots to keep.
settings.autosave_path_desc: Custom folder for autosave files. Leave blank for system temp.
settings.numerator_desc: Top number of the time signature (beats per bar).
settings.denominator_desc: Bottom number of the time signature (beat value).
settings.author_desc: Default author name for MusicXML metadata.
settings.low_cutoff_desc: Filter out frequencies below this point.
settings.high_cutoff_desc: Filter out frequencies above this point.
settings.kb_no_ui_desc: The following keybinds do not correspond to any graphical interface element.

playback.volume_desc: Adjust the overall loudness of the audio playback.

flag.name: Name
flag.sub_hint: Clicks per bar. Setting this to 0 disables the metronome for this flag.
flag.insert_n: Insert N flags between this and next
flag.insert_prompt: How many flags to insert between this and the next one?

lyrics.add_hint: Single-click to add, Enter to edit

progress.title: Processing...
progress.please_wait: Please wait while we process your request.
